title: Invisible Things
description: Invisible blocks and items which all have survival friendly recipes.
body:
## **What does this mod do?**
**This great mod adds a bunch of invisible blocks and items.**

This adds things from a normal invisible block to a pressure plate and a door, all invisible! This can be great to fool your friend and also is very interesting to make an invisble house and even farm with the walls, fences and fence gates. Whatever you do, this mod is sure to bring some fun!

[![Forge Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge%20Versions-16181c?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=16181c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/invisible/versions?l=forge)
[![NeoForge Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge%20Versions-16181c?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=16181c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/invisible/versions?l=neoforge)

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
